# Copilot instructions

This repository's agent guidance lives in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) (also
available as `AGENTS.md`). Start there: it establishes whether you are *using*
or *developing* hpc-oda-commons and routes accordingly.

If you are **developing** the project, you must follow
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — the workflow, quality gate, and coding
standards. `main` is a protected branch (required CI + review, no direct pushes).
